Container.Name: cothimich
Container.Overview: GPS-disciplined NTP server running gpsd and chrony. Requires a USB or serial GPS receiver. Serves NTP to your LAN and exposes gpsd on port 2947 for location clients. Supports optional PPS input via serial port for sub-millisecond accuracy.

Config.Name: GPS Device
Config.Description: Path to your GPS receiver. USB dongles: /dev/ttyACM0 or /dev/ttyUSB0. Serial GPS: /dev/ttyS0.

Config.Name: Serial Port (optional)
Config.Description: Serial port for PPS-capable GPS on DB9. Leave blank if using USB GPS. Set to /dev/ttyS0 when NEO-M8T is connected.

Config.Name: GPS Device Path
Config.Description: Must match the GPS Device mapping above. For serial GPS use /dev/ttyS0.

Config.Name: GPS Baud Rate
Config.Description: Baud rate for your GPS. USB dongles: 9600. NEO-M8T on serial: 9600 default, can be set higher.

Config.Name: PPS Device (optional)
Config.Description: PPS device path for sub-millisecond accuracy. Set to /dev/pps0 when NEO-M8T is connected to DB9 with PPS wired to DCD pin. Leave blank for USB GPS.

Config.Name: Chrony Drift File
Config.Description: Persistent storage for chrony drift file.
